mode: runtime-equivalent dialogue QA using generated runtime.yaml branch policies

strategy_evidence.expected_answer: ideal branch advances and each round goal states the expected source evidence
strategy_evidence.wrong_or_unproductive_answer: unexpected branch validates then redirects to the exact source evidence
strategy_evidence.help_or_confusion: unexpected/help handling is covered by modeling a smaller valid action or naming support limits
strategy_evidence.silence_no_response: no_response branch waits briefly, models one tiny response, and avoids pressure
strategy_evidence.premature_done: runtime goals require current beat evidence before advancing; closing/celebrate do not introduce unsupported completion claims
